nasb.text: God brings him out of Egypt, He is for him like the horns of the wild ox. He will devour the nations who are his adversaries, And will crush their bones in pieces, And shatter them with his arrows.

esv.text: God brings him out of Egypt and is for him like the horns of the wild ox; he shall eat up the nations, his adversaries, and shall break their bones in pieces and pierce them through with his arrows.

cnv.text: 領他出埃及的　神， 對他好像野牛的角； 他要吞吃敵國， 打碎他們的骨頭， 用箭射透他們。

ccb.text: 上帝把他们带出埃及， 祂的力量如野牛之角。 他们要吞灭敌国， 打碎敌人的骨头， 用利箭射穿仇敌。
